required: Customize all parts of the message so they are directly relevant to the customer's specific request, issue, and prior context
Remove any unnecessary information that does not help address the customer's topic
Keep the message text-friendly by making it clear, concise, and easy to read without overwhelming the customer
not_allowed: Personalized details that are irrelevant, forced, or not supported by the conversation
Generic filler, repetition, side topics, or excessive explanation not tied to the case
Dense, cluttered, overly long, or hard-to-scan writing
